title: Dutch Tomato Bake
description: A simple and comforting Dutch-inspired casserole made with tomatoes and baked to perfection.
instructions: Chop the onion and mince the garlic.
In a large bowl, combine the chopped onion, minced garlic, and dried oregano.
Add the olive oil, salt, and pepper to the bowl and mix well.
Add the tomato wedges to the bowl and toss to coat with the onion mixture.
Transfer the tomato mixture to a baking dish.
Dot the top of the tomato mixture with butter.
Bake in the preheated oven for 30 minutes.
Remove from the oven and let it rest for 10 minutes before serving.
